text.tspan: The same caseload and evaluation timeline — now with real-time
fidelity tracking, auto-scored assessments, and automated
follow-up outreach, freeing Marcus to spend his limited time
Keep families engaged for the full course of treatment
Have time to actually be present with clients, not just document them
Didn't have to be the one
Solid curve = ideal, resolved state · Highest point at Phase 6 — full trust in the final dataset
